expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable workspace admins to invite members, manage roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership invitation and audit persistence",
      "description": "As a product team, I want membership and audit records stored consistently so that admin changes are durable and traceable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace membership data stores role and access state for each member",
        "Audit records can capture invite, role change, and revoke membership events",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_workspace_membership_audit.sql",
        "src/db/schema/workspace-members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend member invitation flow",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that new collaborators can join without direct database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite action validates email and requested workspace role",
        "Creating an invite records an audit event for the membership change",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/invite-workspace-member.ts",
        "src/server/routes/workspace-members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend member role change flow",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so that permissions stay accurate.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role change action only accepts viewer, editor, and admin roles",
        "Successful role changes persist the new role and record an audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/update-workspace-member-role.ts",
        "src/server/routes/workspace-members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add backend member access revocation flow",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that former collaborators no longer retain permissions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revocation action removes or disables workspace access for the selected member",
        "Revoking access records an audit event for the membership change",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/revoke-workspace-member.ts",
        "src/server/routes/workspace-members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add workspace settings member management panel",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want invite, role change, and revoke controls in workspace settings so that I can manage membership from one UI surface.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings shows invite form and per-member role and revoke controls",
        "Submitting any membership control reflects the persisted result in the settings view",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace/settings.tsx",
        "src/components/workspace/member-management-panel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add membership audit log view in workspace settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can confirm who was invited, updated, or removed.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings displays recent membership audit entries with actor, action, and timestamp",
        "Audit view refreshes after invite, role change, and revoke actions",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace/settings.tsx",
        "src/components/workspace/member-audit-log.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
